_comentario: 🏙️ CIUDADES - Edita la información de cada ciudad

cities.name: Warsaw
cities.description: Capital of Poland, rebuilt from ashes after WWII. A city where every brick tells a story of resilience.

cities.name: Krakow
cities.description: Former royal capital where culture and faith became the strongest walls against the regime.

cities.name: Wrocław
cities.description: Where subversive laughter became a political weapon. The city that disarmed the system with a smile.

cities.name: Poznań
cities.description: Historic trade city where the first major anti-communist uprising shook the system in 1956.

cities.name: Katowice
cities.description: Industrial powerhouse of Upper Silesia. A city where coal miners and workers forged a unique identity of resistance.

cities.name: Gdańsk
cities.description: The Baltic port where the Solidarity movement was born, changing the course of European history.

cities.name: Zielona Góra
cities.description: Birthplace of Talking Cities. In these Recovered Territories, resistance took on a unique character shaped by identity and belonging.
